claims.claim_text: House of Training already offers prompt-engineering training in Luxembourg.
claims.notes: House of Training has a public prompt engineering course for financial-sector employees and broader ChatGPT/GenAI courses that cover prompt creation and practical use.

claims.claim_text: Free public guidance exists for generic prompt engineering.
claims.notes: OpenAI publishes free prompting guidance and Academy materials, which weakens any claim that prompt engineering knowledge is scarce or uniquely packaged.

claims.claim_text: Practical prompt use should be combined with privacy and governance awareness.
claims.notes: The House of Training finance courses explicitly connect prompting with GDPR and AI Act requirements, and OpenAI guidance also assumes careful prompt design and context handling.

claims.claim_text: Luxembourg company training co-funding is relevant to this product category.
claims.notes: Guichet confirms co-funding for continuing vocational training in Luxembourg, subject to the usual exclusions.

claims.claim_text: The workshop will deliver a company-specific prompt library of 30-50 tested prompts.
claims.notes: This is a proposed deliverable, not a public fact.
claims.next_action: treat as open question, not as fact

claims.claim_text: Customization is the main differentiator, not knowledge.
claims.notes: This is a positioning interpretation, not an externally verified fact.
claims.next_action: treat as open question, not as fact

claims.claim_text: SME Package AI 70% applies to this workshop.
claims.notes: The reviewed sources do not prove that the exact AI-package claim applies to this product.
claims.next_action: treat as open question, not as fact

claims.claim_text: The workshop can be sold as a 1-2 day format with a prompt library outcome.
claims.notes: The duration and deliverable set are internal design choices rather than public facts.
claims.next_action: treat as open question, not as fact
